name: agentcore-multiple-tools-time
input: You have access to weather and time tools. When asked about weather, use get_weather. When asked about time, use get_time. Be concise. Use the get_time tool exactly once to get the current time in London.
output:
<thinking>I have retrieved the current time in London using the get_time tool. I will now share this information with the User.</thinking>

The current time in London is 7:00 AM GMT.
